title: To Be Read In The Morning And At Night
content:
My love
Has told me
That he needs me.

That's why
I take good care of myself
Watch out where I'm going and
Fear that any drop of rain
Might kill me.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Bertolt Brecht, titled "To Be Read In The Morning And At Night", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
